title: Bounded Monotone Sequence Checks

solver_reuse.target: bounded monotone-sequence bad upper-bound QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite replay computes a_6 = 6/7 for the prefix a_n=n/(n+1), while the malformed row claims the prefix is bounded above by 5/6.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional sequence rows only when they add distinct bounded-tail, recurrence-prefix, supremum, or exact-sum solver pressure; keep monotone convergence, completeness, compactness, and all quantified infinite-tail theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite monotone-prefix and tail-gap checks as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay finite sequence witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Route false finite upper-bound claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the offending witness value.
Keep monotone convergence, completeness of the reals, compactness, and quantified infinite-tail theorems marked Lean-horizon.
